introDescription: We are architects of solutions for high-demand environments. At Quandum, we design and develop electronic systems and control software that ensure success in mission-critical operations. From concept development to final certification, we provide the technical rigor required to transform complex challenges into reliable operational systems.

solutions.subtitle: Our presence spans key sectors that drive technological development and the infrastructure of the future.

aeroespacial.title: AEROSPACE
aeroespacial.description: Safety, certification and critical flight systems.

aeronavegabilidad.label: Airworthiness
aeronavegabilidad.body: End-to-end development from specification through to certification under RTCA/DO-178 and DO-254 standards.

computacion.label: Embedded Computing
computacion.body: Design of Full Custom onboard monitors (Mechanical, Electronic and SW) tailored to specific platforms.

mantenimiento.label: Maintenance & Retrofit
mantenimiento.body: Upgrade of existing systems, aircraft life extension and technical documentation management.

ingenieria.label: Reverse Engineering
ingenieria.body: Advanced solutions for obsolete systems, ensuring the operational continuity of the fleet.

defensa.title: DEFENSE
defensa.description: Tactical technology, precision and compliance with military regulations.

optronica.label: Optronic Systems
optronica.body: Design of cameras and vision algorithms with multi-wavelength response (VIS, NIR, SWIR and Thermal).

laser.label: Laser Technology
laser.body: Development of laser illuminators and designators (CW or PW) for mission-critical applications.

comunicaciones.label: Mission Communications
comunicaciones.body: Video systems and robust protocols for high electromagnetic interference environments.

estandares.label: Military Standards
estandares.body: Equipment validated under MIL-STD-704 for extreme EMI/EMC and environmental conditions.

industrial.title: INDUSTRIAL
industrial.description: Production capacity, rapid prototyping and tailored solutions.

fabricacion.label: Additive Manufacturing
fabricacion.body: Specialists in 3D metal sintering and high-precision machining for complex components.

envolventes.label: Mechanical Enclosures
envolventes.body: Development of housings and robust structures for protection of critical electronics in demanding environments.

harness.label: Harness & Wiring
harness.body: Manufacture of specific cable harnesses for sectors with high technical and reliability requirements.

bancos.label: Test Benches
bancos.body: Design and construction of custom test environments for the validation of industrial systems.
